top_signals.title: Breaking America’s Promise to Pacific Island Veterans
top_signals.summary:
In January, Robson Henry died at the age of 66. Chances are, you have never heard of Henry. He was not famous, rich, or powerful. In many ways, Henry was no different from the thousands of young men and women who, at the age of 18, chose to serve by enlisting in the U.S. Army. Nor does the fact that he stayed in the Army for the next 26 years, serving multiple tours of duty in the Middle East, meaningfully distinguish him. And yet, Henry was special: Unlike the vast majority of his fellow soldiers, he was not from the

The post Breaking America’s Promise to Pacific Island Veterans appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Modi Adviser Urges India to Seek More Chinese Investment, Trade
top_signals.summary: India should deepen economic ties with Beijing by opening the door to greater Chinese investment and reconsidering regional trade pacts as shifting geopolitics make the US a less dependable partner, an adviser to Prime Minister Narendra Modi said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan says bitcoin outlook sees ‘encouraging sign’ as Strategy boosts cash reserves
top_signals.summary: Strategy's larger cash reserves and improving institutional demand in bitcoin futures are "encouraging signs" for bitcoin, JPMorgan said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Claude Chrome extension flaw lets malicious extensions trigger AI actions
top_signals.summary: A flaw in Anthropic's Claude for Chrome browser extension could allow a malicious extension to trigger predefined AI actions by simulating user clicks, potentially allowing it to abuse Claude's access to connected services such as Gmail, Google Docs, Google Calendar, and Salesforce. [...]
